seoTitle: West Range vs West Richmond — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between West Range and West Richmond. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: West Range vs West Richmond: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in West Range and West Richmond.
heading: West Range vs West Richmond — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between West Range, South Australia and West Richmond, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Richmond has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to West Range (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is West Range or West Richmond safer from flooding?
faq.answer: West Range has a flood risk score of 35/100, while West Richmond scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: West Range scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. West Richmond scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in West Range or West Richmond?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Richmond has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
